A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Why do I find this interesting?

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-10-20 · 6 answers
Am i depraved or something?

http://www.indiaenews.com/sports/20071020/76297.htm
user [194] · 2007-10-21
yeah..probably like womens legs! :)

Such women are considered as prostitutes by radical muslims and vaisnavas....
Women should be chaste:no football or swimsuits!
user [24] · 2007-10-21
The whole interesting thing was that I think I read in the article that they play in full coverage - veil and all.
user [194] · 2007-10-21
Sorry,Prabhu! So its funny....but still women should not be offered as a spectacle,though they should be able to play in private...and even swim..without clothing :in private...
ps.Did the gopis really swim naked? :)
user [13] · 2007-10-22
Human beings need to expose their bodies to the sun or they suffer from Vitamin D deficiency, a leading contributor to cancer.

In ancient India, during the Vedic cultural period women walked around topless. Take a look at some of the statues on the temples.

Some of our ideas about women were imported to India with the Muslim invasion. Others were imported with the British invasion.
user [154] · 2007-10-23
[quote][cite] sitapati:[/cite]

In ancient India, during the Vedic cultural period women walked around topless. Take a look at some of the statues on the temples.

Some of our ideas about women were imported to India with the Muslim invasion. Others were imported with the British invasion.[/quote]

True, but not of dvidja women. but certainly true for sudra population. there are foreigh travelers records that confirm this fact for India before Mogul invasion.
user [38] · 2007-10-23
Those temple reliefs/statues usually show apsaras, heavenly entertainers, i.e. sudras by varna.
